title: チャンピオンズCにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Champions Cup is held at Chukyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This racecourse, which also hosts several popular
turf races, is bustling with spectators today. Its
stalls are filled to just under maximum capacity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The boisterous cheering even reaches Smart
Falcon in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Y-you know, I think I'm actually feeling... super
nervous?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's just... It's been a long time since I've felt like
this.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Things have been going great, but what if today's
the day I mess up?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What if I don't win, even when everyone's
cheering me on?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. That's helped my nerves a
little!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I want to sparkle today. And I'm
not letting go of that feeling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna shine like never before!
